subject: Fw: For JE's use at AYH
body:
----- Forwarded Message -----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To: DKIESQ@aol.com 
Sent: Friday, March 23, 2007 1:26 PM
Subject: Fw: For JE's use at AYH
 





----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, March 23, 2007 1:17:05 PM
Subject: FW: For JE's use at AYH

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 


________________________________
 From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Friday, March 23, 2007 11:56 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: For JE's use at AYH
Importance: High


To whom it may concern,
                        Please be nice to Miss Daisey.  You see, she actually owns this fucking place and could shit can your ass at a moment’s notice.  Do not be fooled by the veneer of this sweet old lady.  She’s a vicious killer.  So, give her the friggin’ slip and save your career.
                                                                                                                                                With Fondest Regards,
                                                                                                                                                Andrew L. Farkas
                                                                                                                                                CEO
                                                                                                                                                Island Global Yachting 
 
The information contained in this message and any attachment to it may be privileged, confidential or otherwise protected from disclosure. If you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. Please also note that any views or opinions presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not necessarily represent those of the company.
